export function getXHRResponse(xhr) { switch (xhr.responseType) { case 'json': { if ('response' in xhr) { return xhr.response; } else { const ieXHR = xhr; return JSON.parse(ieXHR.responseText); } } case 'document': return xhr.responseXML; case 'text': default: { if ('response' in xhr) { return xhr.response; } else { const ieXHR = xhr; return ieXHR.responseText; } } } } //# sourceMappingURL=getXHRResponse.js.map
